title: Prime Minister's Research Fellowship (PMRF) 2025
eligibility: B.Tech/M.Tech/MSc graduates with excellent academic record from recognized Indian institutions.
benefits: Monthly stipend of Rs.70,000 to Rs.80,000 for 5 years plus research grant of Rs.2 lakh per year.
applicationProcess: Apply online through the official PMRF portal. Shortlisted candidates appear for interview.
selectionProcess: Academic record screening followed by research aptitude interview.

title: NSP Central Sector Scholarship 2025
university: Ministry of Education, Govt. of India
eligibility: Students who passed Class 12 with more than 80 percent marks and family income below Rs.8 lakh per annum.
benefits: Rs.10,000 per year for UG students and Rs.20,000 per year for PG students.
applicationProcess: Register on NSP portal at scholarships.gov.in and fill the application form.
selectionProcess: Merit based on Class 12 percentage and income criteria.

title: Telangana TS ePass Scholarship 2025
eligibility: SC, ST, BC, EBC students of Telangana studying in recognized colleges. Family income limit applies.
benefits: Full tuition fee reimbursement plus maintenance allowance for hostellers.
applicationProcess: Apply online at telanganaepass.cgg.gov.in through your college.
selectionProcess: Based on caste and income certificate verification.

title: Andhra Pradesh YSR Vidyadeevanam Scholarship
eligibility: SC, ST, BC, EBC, Kapu students of Andhra Pradesh studying professional courses.
benefits: Full fee reimbursement for engineering, medical, law and other professional courses.
applicationProcess: Apply through AP ePass portal or college nodal officer.

title: INSPIRE Scholarship for Higher Education (SHE)
university: Department of Science and Technology, Govt of India
eligibility: Top 1 percent students in Class 12 pursuing Natural and Basic Sciences at BSc/BS/Int MSc level.
benefits: Rs.80,000 per year for 5 years of BSc and MSc combined.
applicationProcess: Online application at online-inspire.gov.in after obtaining nomination.
selectionProcess: Top 1 percent rank in Class 12 Board or top rank in JEE/NEET.

title: Maulana Azad National Fellowship (MANF)
university: Ministry of Minority Affairs, Govt of India
eligibility: Students belonging to minority communities (Muslim, Christian, Sikh, Buddhist, Jain, Zoroastrian) pursuing MPhil or PhD.
benefits: Junior Research Fellowship Rs.31,000 per month for first 2 years, SRF Rs.35,000 for next 3 years.
applicationProcess: Apply through UGC portal. Eligible students must have cleared UGC NET.
selectionProcess: UGC NET score and university recommendation.

title: Fulbright-Nehru Master's Fellowships 2025-26
eligibility: Indian citizens with a bachelor degree and minimum 3 years work experience. Strong academic record required.
benefits: Full tuition, living stipend, health insurance, airfare and book allowance.
applicationProcess: Apply through USIEF India website. Candidates appear for written test and interview.
selectionProcess: Written test, interview, and review by US-India Educational Foundation.

title: Commonwealth Scholarships for Developing Countries 2025
eligibility: Citizens of Commonwealth countries including India. First class bachelor degree required.
benefits: Airfare, tuition, living allowance, thesis grant and warm clothing allowance.
applicationProcess: Apply through the Commonwealth Scholarship Commission online system.
selectionProcess: Nominated by national agency in home country, then reviewed by CSC.

title: Karnataka Rajyotsava Scholarship for SC/ST Students
eligibility: SC and ST students domiciled in Karnataka pursuing government recognized courses.
benefits: Tuition fee, examination fee, and hostel maintenance charges.
applicationProcess: Apply through Karnataka Sakala portal or district social welfare office.
selectionProcess: Verification by district social welfare officer.

title: Tamil Nadu Chief Minister's Scholarship for SC Students
university: Tamil Nadu Adi Dravidar and Tribal Welfare Dept
eligibility: SC students domiciled in Tamil Nadu with family income below Rs.2.5 lakh per annum.
benefits: Full tuition fee reimbursement and hostel charges.
applicationProcess: Apply through the Tamil Nadu government scholarship portal.
selectionProcess: Verified by Adi Dravidar Welfare District Officer.

title: AICTE Pragati Scholarship for Girl Students 2025
university: All India Council for Technical Education
eligibility: Girl students admitted to AICTE approved technical institutes. Family income below Rs.8 lakh.
benefits: Rs.50,000 per year for tuition and living expenses.
applicationProcess: Apply on NSP portal through AICTE Pragati scheme section.
selectionProcess: Based on academic merit and income criteria.

title: Daad Scholarship Germany for Indian Students 2025
eligibility: Indian graduates with above average academic record. Relevant work experience preferred.
benefits: Monthly stipend, travel allowance, health insurance, and study and research subsidy.
applicationProcess: Apply through DAAD portal. Some programs require applying directly to German universities.
selectionProcess: Academic record, language skills, and interview.

title: UGC PG Scholarship for SC/ST Students
eligibility: SC and ST students who have qualified through NET/GATE or secured admission in PG program.
benefits: Rs.3,100 per month for first and second year of postgraduation.
applicationProcess: Apply through UGC portal. University submits list of eligible students.
selectionProcess: Based on NET/GATE score or entrance exam marks.

title: Chevening Scholarship India 2025-26
eligibility: Indian citizens with 2 years work experience and bachelor degree. English proficiency required.
benefits: Full tuition, living allowance, airfare, and visa fee.
applicationProcess: Apply online at chevening.org/apply during the application window.
selectionProcess: Online application, shortlisting, and in-person interview.

title: Maharashtra Government SC/ST Scholarship 2025
eligibility: SC and ST students domiciled in Maharashtra studying in recognized institutions.
benefits: Tuition fee, exam fee, and living allowance.
applicationProcess: Apply through MahaDBT portal at mahadbt.maharashtra.gov.in.
selectionProcess: Verified through district social welfare office.
